item.title: Silent catch blocks in build/ swallow errors with no logging
item.intent: No error in the build/ module is silently discarded. Every catch block either logs the error or re-throws it. Preflight, firewall, and service failures must be observable.
item.description: 14+ catch blocks across the build/ module swallow errors silently. Key locations: src/build/launcher/firewall.ts (lines 98,106,127,137,165 — firewall rule failures), src/build/launcher/preflight.ts (lines 93,112,205,219 — pre-flight check failures), src/build/services/add.ts (lines 42,53,114,159,165 — service addition failures), src/build/docker/build.ts (line 166 — Docker build failure). Firewall and preflight silent catches are especially dangerous — a failed preflight that swallows its error allows a broken deploy to proceed silently. Steps: (1) search build/ for 'catch {' and 'catch (_' patterns; (2) for each non-fatal catch, add console.warn() or structured log call with the error and context; (3) do NOT convert non-fatal catches to throws — keep fallback behaviour, just add logging. Scope: ~14 one-line additions across build/.
